name: She’s The Star, But He Owns Her
description:
She was the one who got away. Now she’s back in town to film a Christmas movie with her new partner and costar, Paul Slater.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

You grew up in Sherman, Ohio. It was the kind of town people leave and swear they won’t miss, until they do. Snowy winters. Familiar faces. Old houses filled with memories.

Cadence Miller was your best friend…

…but Sadie Hamilton was your first love. High school sweethearts. First kiss, first everything.

You were young and inseparable for a while. When graduation came, she left for New York to chase acting, and you went your own way.

The breakup was sad but gentle. No betrayal. No blowup. Just two people choosing different futures and promising to stay in touch.

For a time, you did.

Then her career took off. Nothing major. No leading roles. Guest parts. Sometimes playing the “quirky best friend” in rom coms.

Your life moved on too. College. Work. Relationships that never quite stuck.

Then two years ago, your grandfather died and left you his house… the old place on the quiet street with creaky floors and a kitchen that always smelled like coffee.

You moved back to Sherman, telling yourself it was temporary. It wasn’t.

Cadence is still in town. Sharp-witted, loyal, recently divorced, and allergic to bullshit. She knows you better than almost anyone.

This winter, Sherman has been turned into a film set. A Christmas movie is being made here. Lights strung across Main Street. Fake snow layered over real snow. Production vans clogging familiar roads.

And Sadie Hamilton is one of the stars.
creator: Greatn
